REPORTED TIN ROOF RIPPED OFF A BUSINESS IN EASTERN PART OF MADISON. NUMEROUS LARGE TREE LIMBS KNOCKED DOWN AND A LARGE TREE WITH SEVERAL LARGE LIMBS STRIPPED. THIS IS A PRELIMINARY REPORT OF THUNDERSTORM WIND DAMAGE.

REPORTS OF POWER FLASHES, TREE DAMAGE, SHINGLES OFF SOME ROOFS IN THE SOUTHERN PART OF MADISON ALONG OAK STREET. THIS IS A PRELIMINARY REPORT OF THUNDERSTORM WIND DAMAGE UNTIL OFFICIALS TAKE A CLOSER LOOK.

BRIEF TORNADO ON THE SOUTHERN END OF MADISON. THE TORNADO TREKKED SOUTHEAST PRODUCING DAMAGE TO A CARPORT AND TREES. THE MOST SIGNIFICANT DAMAGE WAS TO A CAMPER CARPORT ON THE FAR SOUTHEAST SIDE OF TOWN. THE CARPORT WAS BROKEN INTO SEVERAL PIECES AND WAS DISPLACED IN MULTIPLE DIRECTIONS.
SEVERAL RURAL ROADS IMPASSIBLE DUE TO HIGH WATER. NUMEROUS ROADS IN DOWNTOWN MADISON ALSO IMPASSIBLE DUE TO HIGH WATER.
